findings.title: Bare bun test fails from the reviewed worktree
findings.description: The ticket requires CI to run bare bun test and the evidence bundle claims that gate is green, but re-running bun test in the reviewed worktree exits 1. Three poc tests fail when ApprovalGateServer.start calls Bun.serve with port 0, reporting that the server failed to start. Because .github/workflows/ci.yml runs bun test, the CI gate is not currently green and the full-suite green evidence is not reproducible.
